text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My favorite clothing store is having a sale, so I
decide to drop by.

text_block_list.name: Fashionable Umamusume
text_block_list.text: This one is so cuuuute! I saw it in a magazine!

text_block_list.name: Trend-chasing Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
What do you think, Nature? I think you'd look
good in this color.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I'm okay. This kind of stuff isn't my style,
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Fashionable Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Shut up! You could totally pull it off!

text_block_list.name: Trend-chasing Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
We're going to try these on. You really should try
one too!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay, okay. If the feeling strikes me, then maybe.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, heya, Trainer. What a coincidence meeting
you here. Are you buying some new clothes too?
choice_data_list: Yeah, thought I'd stock up while they're on sale.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I see. So... why's your shopping cart empty then?
choice_data_list: There are too many options. I can't decide...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huh... Why not leave it to me? I'll fill your cart in
no time.
choice_data_list:
I'm more curious about the clothes you were
looking at.
Sounds amazing! But what about your friends?
Sounds amazing! But what about your friends?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huh... Why not leave it to me? I'll fill your cart in
no time.
choice_data_list:
I'm more curious about the clothes you were
looking at.
Sounds amazing! But what about your friends?
Sounds amazing! But what about your friends?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah... this?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
They told me it would look good on me, but ruffly
clothes just aren't my style.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm more of a plain clothes kinda gal, you know?
choice_data_list: I think it'd look great on you!
I think it'd look great on you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay, okay, enough flattery.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You're here to buy clothes for yourself, right?
Why don't you go ahead and pick something.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You can pout all you want, but I am not wearing this.
choice_data_list: But I really do think it'd look good on you...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, don't be like that. You're old enough to
know when to give up, right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
F-fine. If you insist, I guess I can at least hold it
up in front of me so you can get an idea.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna go really fast, so don't blink.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Done. That's it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I said that's it, so that's it! No matter what you
say!
choice_data_list: I was right! It looked really good on you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Right.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh... Show's over! Now skedaddle! Better yet,
I'll skedaddle!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Goodbye, Trainer! Make sure to delete that
image from your memory too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as she finishes speaking, Nice Nature runs
off...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...With the clothes we were just talking about still
in hand.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm just here because they wanted to come here.
Besides, they told me I don't have to stick
around.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Can you wait here for a second? I'll go tell them.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay. Shall we start?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Now what you would look good in... Never really
seen you in flashy clothes, but maybe it could be
your new thing.
choice_data_list: You seem like you're having fun.
You seem like you're having fun.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I like choosing clothes for other people. Just not
the other way around.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Especially when they pick something cutesy. I just
feel bad because I know it won't look good on
me.
choice_data_list:
I think you would look good in something like
that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Please. Not you too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
We're here to pick out clothes for you. Forget
about me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Nice Nature, I find a lot of good
clothes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although, that means that I've got my work cut
out lugging it all home.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, well, well. You've got one heck of a haul
there.
choice_data_list: All thanks to your sharp stylist instincts.
All thanks to your sharp stylist instincts.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, you are my trainer, after all.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I care about you, even if it doesn't seem that way.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of, let me carry some of that stuff for
you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Your arms are shaking, and I can't bear to watch
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Don't be stubborn now! You're not a child!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oof, there we go! Okay, we're off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as my arms are at their limit, I
begrudgingly hand Nice Nature a few bags, and
we make our way back to campus.
